title: Back2Alpha
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

## Goal
This modpack aims to bring the old look, gameplay and overall feel of the Alpha versions.

## Features
This modpack modifies almost every aspect of the game, as to almost perfectly recreate Alpha 1.1.2.

This features include:
- Removal of deepslate, kelp/seagrass, copper, any structure, some modern recipes, hunger, sprinting, swimming, 

## Included mods
The pack's basis is on [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), as to bring the overall smoothness of the original versions. Other major mods included are [Nostalgia Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks), [Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta/version/1.4.0+1.21), and some of my own such as [Nostalgia Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgia-items), [Nostalgia Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgia-features-alpha), etc.
